name: Libromancer Prevented
name_jp: リブロマンサー・プリベント
desc: If you control a "Libromancer" monster: You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; this turn, that face-up monster cannot be used as material for a Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Link Summon. You can only use this effect of "Libromancer Prevented" once per turn. Once per turn, during the End Phase, if you control no "Libromancer" Ritual Monsters: Send this card to the GY.
eff: If you control a "Libromancer" monster: You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; this turn, that face-up monster cannot be used as material for a Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Link Summon. You can only use this effect of "Libromancer Prevented" once per turn. Once per turn, during the End Phase, if you control no "Libromancer" Ritual Monsters: Send this card to the GY.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

action: Sends itself from field to Graveyard
summoning: Cannot be used as a Fusion Material
Cannot be used as a Synchro Material
Cannot be used as an Xyz Material
Cannot be used as a Link Material
